raw_consumer_statement:
XX/XX/year> Request to Reopen Dispute case id XXXX On Monday XX/XX/XXXX I found out my wife needed emergency XXXX while on vacation in California. I searched for hotel rooms online. I booked a room through XXXX for XXXX by XXXX XXXX XXXX for XXXX XXXX. I was given reservation number XXXX and was told I would receive a confirmation email. Later in the day after planning our trip to be with my wife for her XXXX I looked and noticed I didnt receive the confirmation email. I tried calling XXXX. When you pick any prompt but new reservation, they want information from the email I never received. I called again and went through the new reservation prompt and got a live person. I explained my situation and they gave me a different phone number. I called the new number XXXX which was for the XXXX XXXX and was given a different confirmation number XXXX. Neither confirmation number came up on the hotel website. At this point I felt like I had been scammed. I called the XXXX number back and requested to cancel. They told me I couldnt and that I needed to contact price line. I explained I had gone through XXXX I sent booking.com a message to cancel. 
I received an email back while I was travelling on Tuesday. Again, requesting information from the email, I never received. I replied that I never received the email. I got more emails from XXXX  requesting the info I didnt have. My last attempt was the phone number from the email. The phone number XXXX was automated AI which again requested the information they never sent me. 
I had let the XXXX XXXX know we had made other accommodation and wouldnt be staying there. XXXX made it impossible to cancel the reservation. 
After receiving the denial from Citi for lack of paperwork I called. I explained I never got the confirmation email, so I didnt have that to send in. I spoke to XXXX different departments with the last telling me to fax a letter to reopen the dispute. Again, without the confirmation email I never received there is no way for me to cancel my reservation. I have included copies of my phone log showing calls I made trying to cancel. I also included copies of my emails trying to cancel. I also have phone recordings. 

Citi again denied the dispute for lack of cancellation information from XXXX XXXX didn't supply the information I needed to cancel.
